content.en:
The Triangle Blood Bull King flew towards a long distance with Ye Tian, not the grassland where the Triangle Blood Bull King lived.

Through inquiry, Ye Tian knew why the Triangle Blood Bull King didn't live in the place where the Well of Origin was located.

One is afraid that other Triangle Blood Bulls will know about the Origin Well, so as to give birth to a new Triangle Blood Bull King, and the second is that they are afraid of attracting the attention of other powerful Source Beasts.

Of course, there is a third reason, and that is that it is not suitable for the triangular blood cattle to survive.

The Triangle Blood Ox family is suitable for living on the grassland, so the grass on the grassland contains the energy that their Triangle Blood Cattle family needs to help them grow.

If the place is moved, the Triangle Blood Cow Clan may be reduced to a mid-level source beast in the future, or even lower.

It's like a fire-based source beast, if you have to let it live in the waters, wouldn't it be difficult to get along with yourself.

Three days later.

The triangular blood cow took Ye Tian to a canyon, and in this canyon there was a deep, deep cave that led to the depths of the ground.

However, the entrance of this cave is very small, and ordinary people can't pay attention to it at all, let alone the group of source beasts with low IQs.

Moreover, this canyon has no resources, it is very barren, and it is impossible for powerful source beasts to come here.

"It's a good place, if there is a Well of Origin here, it will be very difficult to find it!"

Ye Tian nodded appreciatively.

He was a little curious about how the ancestors of the Triangle Blood Bull King found out about this place in the first place, and what a good luck it was!

The Triangle Blood Bull King took Ye Tian into the cave, and kept flying downward, and soon encountered several underground cave entrance passages, and continued to fly after choosing one of the passages.

I don't know how long it flew, until the Triangle Blood Bull King stopped.

At this time, Ye Tian clearly felt that the suppression of him by the Origin Realm was even greater, and it was obvious that the suppression in the depths of the underground was stronger than the suppression on the ground.

There are simply no powerful creatures here, otherwise it would be a little dangerous for Ye Tian to come down like this.

"It's here!"

The Triangle Blood Bull King looked at Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's divine sense swept away, and he immediately saw the well of origin.

The Well of Origin was in the center of an underground space not far away, embedded in the void, and wisps of Origin breath emanated.

"The Well of Origin !!"

Ye Tian was a little excited.

Suddenly, his expression changed.

Just because there are some cracks in the wellhead and body of this Origin Well, this is not an intact Origin Well, but a broken Origin Well that is somewhat damaged.

Swish!

Ye Tian teleported over and looked inside the Well of Origin.

"The Well of Origin that is about to dry up!!"

Ye Tian was a little disappointed.

There is only a shallow layer of Origin Well water inside this Origin Well, and the value of such an Origin Well can fall countless times!

"What's going on?"

Ye Tian questioned the Triangle Blood Bull King.

The Triangle Blood Bull King immediately informed Ye Tian of the reason, it turned out that the ancestors of the Triangle Blood Bull King were like this when they discovered this Origin Well, the internal Origin Well water was very scarce, and it could accumulate a little bit over a long period of time.

And it took a long time for the Triangle Blood Bull King to come to the Well of Origin many times before he finally got lucky enough to transform his strength and talent.

And since the strength talent transformed into a god-level extreme strength talent, it has rarely come here, and now that a long time has passed, this Origin Well has accumulated a little more Origin Well water.

"Forget it, it's not bad to be able to touch the Origin Well, although the Origin Well has less water, only a little, but at least it can improve its strength a little!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he wiped out the Triangle Blood Bull King, after all, the Triangle Blood Bull King knew about his existence, and if he let it go and attracted the Source Emperor, it would be troublesome.

He's no match for a Source Emperor!

After killing the Triangle Blood Bull King, Ye Tian stepped into the Well of Origin.

The void inside the Well of Origin, Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to absorb the water of the Origin Well in the Well of Origin.

Whoa!!!

The Well of Origin poured into Ye Tian's body, and immediately let Ye Tian witness countless laws and truths, just like when he absorbed a trace of the Origin of the Universe, but the effect was much, much worse.

Although every trace of cosmic origin contains the mysteries of various laws, it does not contain all of them, and the origin well water that Ye Tian absorbed now contains a very different origin from the original trace of cosmic origin.

Therefore, the Origin Well Water was useful to Ye Tian, and it was of great use, making Ye Tian's accumulation deeper and deeper, and his understanding of the laws of the major avenues gradually improved.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's Chaos Avenue realm turned into an ancient well, and with the origin power of the Origin Well Water, it gradually improved the realm of the Chaos Dao.

With the progress of Ye Tian's attainment in the law, the law patterns on the ancient well of the Chaos Avenue became more and more mysterious.

"Sure enough, the Origin Well Water can not only accumulate my law attainments, but also improve my realm on the Chaos Dao, I have reached the Origin Realm, but I am only in the initial stage of the Origin Realm, if there is enough Origin Well Water, it may be able to allow me to impact the middle realm of the Origin Realm!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

However, it was obvious that with such a little bit of Origin Well Water, it was impossible for Ye Tian to improve the Chaos Dao realm, and he could only make a little progress.

However, after absorbing these origin well waters, Ye Tian's speed of comprehending the supernatural powers would be much faster.

So, Ye Tian directly and simply comprehended a great divine power here-the Spear of the Hell Divine Sky.

This Spatial Great Divine Power had already reached the peak realm of Dacheng, and it was only one step away from reaching the consummation realm, so Ye Tian wanted to break the bottleneck and impact the consummation realm.

The consummation realm of a space great supernatural power, I am afraid that those supremes who are proficient in the space avenue may not necessarily reach it.

Time passed little by little, and after a few days, the Origin Well water in the Origin Well had completely dried up, but Ye Tian had not finished his retreat yet, because he felt that his Hell Divine Sky Spear was only a little short of breaking through.

At this time, even without the source well water, he felt that he could complete the breakthrough.

Half a year later.

Rumble!!!!

A Hellish Divine Sky Spear containing the rules of the terrifying space gradually emerged, and even if it was suppressed in the Origin Realm, it still showed terrifying power, as if it was resisting the Origin Rules of the universe.

"Huh, the Hell Divine Sky Spear has finally stepped into the Great Perfection Realm, and its attack power is definitely the first attack now!"

Ye Tian muttered.
